title: Elastic NV Q2 2026 Results: Mixed Performance with Earnings Beat
text: Elastic NV reported mixed Q2 2026 results with a revenue miss offset by a strong earnings beat. Financial Highlights: Earnings Per Share: Adjusted EPS exceeded expectations, beating analyst consensus. Revenue: Came in slightly below expectations, indicating some softness in top-line growth. Cloud Revenue: Elastic Cloud revenue showed strong growth, up 23-27% year-over-year depending on the segment. Customer Metrics: Customers with $100k+ ACV continued to grow, indicating strength in the enterprise segment. Subscription revenue growth remained solid at mid-teens percentage. Profitability: Operating margins remained healthy despite revenue miss. Free cash flow generation remained strong. Guidance: Management raised full-year guidance despite the Q2 revenue miss, indicating confidence in near-term demand. Market Context: The mixed results reflected broader macro uncertainty affecting public sector spending, but enterprise and commercial segments remained strong. AI adoption continued to be a bright spot in the business.
